case_summary: Pool pump motor hums but won't run; suspected motor failure after extended load-shedding cycles.

ground_truth.notes: Tests routing to pool_pump_filter when the named equipment is the pool pump and the symptom is motor-side. Should NOT route to load_shedding_surge despite the load-shedding context — the equipment that failed is the pump.

inputs.user_text: Our pool pump won't turn on properly any more. When we switch it on at the pool timer it makes a low humming sound for about ten seconds then trips the small breaker on the pump itself. The pump has been struggling for the last few weeks since the load shedding got worse. Pool water has started to go cloudy because there's been no circulation.
